non_counted_reason: Fresh literal-head slice on 777e5f7 verified explicit-refresh search_text to read_file recovery partially, but the recovery narrowed to one side and selected a self-test/query fixture anchor instead of the actual definition anchor. It emitted no replay bundle, no paired patch, and no verifier artifact, so it is non-counted fix-first infrastructure evidence.
notes: Codex-ultra reviewer session 019dbcf3-b913-7472-b904-12f20aea91c1 approved the fix: explicit-refresh search-result recovery now augments target paths from scoped search calls, prefers def/class/test-definition snippets over query fixture lines, and retains stale-search protection.

head: d2f5e32a8d034ef7b9aebbe23f5eb82e5a6f32c7
verifier: uv run pytest -q tests/test_work_session.py -k 'work_session or no_change_replay_for_current_head_validation_slice or calibration_measured_patch_draft_finish or write_ready_fast_path' --no-testmon
non_counted_reason: Fresh literal-head slice on d2f5e32 showed that explicit-refresh source/test searches could still recover only the test-side widened read because deterministic preflight depended on the compact recent tool window and could lose the source-side explicit-refresh search call. It emitted no replay bundle, no paired patch, and no verifier artifact, so it is non-counted fix-first infrastructure evidence.
notes: Codex-ultra reviewer session 019dbcf3-b913-7472-b904-12f20aea91c1 approved the fix: work session context now carries a bounded durable list of completed explicit-refresh search_text calls outside the prompt recent-tool window, and preflight uses it before ordinary recent tool calls.

head: 25236222308e09901ef81ebbab7cdbce99228c2b
verifier: uv run pytest -q tests/test_work_session.py -k 'work_session or no_change_replay_for_current_head_validation_slice or calibration_measured_patch_draft_finish or write_ready_fast_path' --no-testmon
non_counted_reason: Live task #503 on HEAD 2523622 exercised deterministic explicit-refresh search_text -> paired widened read_file recovery after one setup broad-read guard, then passed the scoped verifier and finished with no material change, but emitted no .mew/replays/work-loop session-486 replay bundle, no patch_draft compiler artifact, no reviewer-visible dry-run patch, and no source/test diff; record as live validation, not M6.11 incidence.
notes: Codex-ultra reviewer session 019dbcf3-b913-7472-b904-12f20aea91c1 approved classification as non-counted no-artifact/live validation. This proves the deterministic explicit-refresh recovery path live but does not satisfy current-head incidence accounting.

head: c099e4cb481d5bb7629fd5b0d5230e223760d8a5
non_counted_reason: Fresh literal-head proof_summary slice on c099e4c reached paired source/test cached windows, but write-ready preflight repeatedly returned insufficient_cached_window_context despite resume marking the paired windows edit_ready. After the first fix, live continuation emitted widened read_file recovery actions but recursively adopted those reads as new cached refs and widened again through max_steps, still without replay bundle, paired patch, verifier, or diff. This is non-counted fix-first infrastructure evidence, not M6.11 incidence.
notes: Codex-ultra reviewer session 019dbcf3-b913-7472-b904-12f20aea91c1 approved the final fix: write-ready fast path accepts structurally complete covering windows over exact incomplete fragments; preflight emits bounded widened reads for incomplete paired refs; guidance can explicitly forbid widening; oversized refs are skipped; and cached refs produced by structural-refresh reads are not recursively widened again.

head: e1c4e2fb68d483c2dd57578ee5f35f1229c0d473
non_counted_reason: Fresh literal-head proof_summary slice on e1c4e2f verified that recursive structural widening no longer repeated, but write-ready preflight chose the scoped filename stem test_proof_summary as the explicit refresh query, searched both source and test files with zero matches, and repeated that zero-match search instead of falling through to widened cached-window reads, a replay bundle, a paired patch, or a verifier artifact. This is non-counted fix-first infrastructure evidence, not M6.11 incidence.
notes: Codex-ultra reviewer session 019dbcf3-b913-7472-b904-12f20aea91c1 approved the plan: exclude path/basename-derived tokens from explicit refresh query candidates and suppress repeated zero-match explicit-refresh searches so preflight can fall through to search-result reads or structural cached-window widening.

head: 2cff876fe5ec82dec4e3e46553b2f2cef1034a6e
non_counted_reason: Fresh literal-head proof_summary slice on 2cff876 reached a same-session patch_draft compiler replay bundle, but it was non-counted because the model-authored patch_blocker code cached_window_incomplete was outside the native patch_draft vocabulary. This is non-counted fix-first infrastructure evidence: replay emission worked, but proof-summary correctly excluded the non-native blocker from current-head incidence.
notes: Codex-ultra reviewer session 019dbcf3-b913-7472-b904-12f20aea91c1 approved the fix: add cached_window_incomplete to PATCH_BLOCKER_RECOVERY_ACTIONS with refresh_cached_window recovery, document it in the tiny write-ready prompt, and add tests proving work-loop replay counting plus proof-summary taxonomy while leaving arbitrary non-native codes coarse/non-counted.

head: ed2e27dc549d2a6ede43ccbbe91014b7ecd18c24
non_counted_reason: Fresh literal-head proof_summary slice on ed2e27d repeatedly hit write-ready preflight insufficient_cached_window_context after paired structural refresh reads, then an extra no-refresh step still produced refresh/search actions instead of a native replay bundle, reviewer-visible paired patch/diff, verifier artifact, or concrete counted blocker. This is non-counted fix-first infrastructure evidence, not M6.11 incidence.
notes: Codex-ultra reviewer session 019dbcf3-b913-7472-b904-12f20aea91c1 approved the fix plan: suppress all explicit refresh recovery when guidance says no refresh, treat a completed structural-refresh read for each paired target path as refresh exhaustion, and emit a native cached_window_incomplete patch-draft compiler replay when paired cached windows remain structurally insufficient after refresh is forbidden or exhausted.

head: 90dc28ed4893f86561fa9210622335bf070893bf
non_counted_reason: Fresh literal-head proof_summary slice on 90dc28e repeated structural refresh reads and then ended in a plain write-ready preflight wait with no replay bundle, reviewer-visible paired patch/diff, or verifier artifact. The previous exhaustion guard depended on structural-refresh read_file calls remaining in the prompt recent tool window; compact context could retain only one side, so exhaustion was not detected for both paired paths. This is non-counted fix-first infrastructure evidence, not M6.11 incidence.
notes: Codex-ultra reviewer session 019dbcf3-b913-7472-b904-12f20aea91c1 approved the metadata-only durable history fix: mirror explicit_refresh_search_tool_calls with bounded structural_refresh_read_tool_calls in work_session context, omit read_file result text to avoid prompt bloat, and use that history when deciding whether structural refresh has already been exhausted for each paired target path.
